anti_recommendations.name: On-chain at hourly horizon as primary
Repeating regime-conditional weights approach
anti_recommendations.note: This is what decommissioned model did; resolution=0

top_3_recommendations.name: XGBoost + engineered features + triple-barrier labels + walk-forward + Brier decomposition diagnostic at every step
top_3_recommendations.what_it_produces: Realistic Brier 0.245-0.249 with non-zero resolution; usable under thresholded actions
implementation_path: TZ-FORECAST-XGBOOST-V1 — train with purged+embargoed CV; weekly retrain
TZ-FORECAST-XGBOOST-V1-DIAGNOSTIC — reliability + Brier decomposition; HARD GATE: resolution>=0.005

top_3_recommendations.name: Order-flow / LOB feature pipeline as v2 layer if v1 passes gating
top_3_recommendations.what_it_produces: Plausible 1-3 percentage point lift in directional accuracy; Brier ~0.235-0.245
implementation_path: Prereq: v1 must have positive resolution
TZ-FORECAST-XGBOOST-V2 — retrain with v2 features; diagnostic comparison
top_3_recommendations.data_acquisition: live L2 LOB stream; ~50-100 GB/month storage

top_3_recommendations.name: LSTM+XGBoost hybrid v3 stretch goal if v1+v2 plateau

realistic_probability_assessment.headline: Most likely outcome is Brier 0.245-0.249 — slight skill, marginally usable under thresholded actions. Hitting <0.22 would put us in top decile of rigorously-validated literature.
realistic_probability_assessment.decommissioned_was_worse_than_baseline: Brier 0.2569 was below the realistic baseline of ~0.249, which means previous attempt was buggy (sign-inversion in trend regimes per diagnostic), not just unsuccessful at hitting <0.22.
realistic_probability_assessment.recommendation_to_operator: The regulation works without a forecast. Adding a marginally-skillful forecast back would be a nice-to-have improvement at the margin, not a required dependency. Consider whether the 1-3 month investment is worth the marginal expected benefit vs leaving the forecast block decommissioned permanently.

open_questions: Public dataset of rigorously-validated Bitcoin 1h-Brier scores
Triple-barrier vs naive label Brier impact on our existing data
Pre-flight feature signal audit on 84-feature parquet
BitMEX L2 LOB stream operational stability
Numerai Crypto submission compatibility with our infrastructure
